summary.notes: No hardcoded credentials (CWE-798), no SQL/command injection (CWE-89/78), no XSS vectors (CWE-79), no insecure deserialization (CWE-502), no auth bypasses. constants.py has only numeric thresholds. state.py uses uuid4() for thread_id. escalate_node.py logs exceptions via structlog (not exposed to end users). Port interfaces define contracts only. No prompt injection risks in these files.
